{{Youmay|the [[Star Wars Legends|Legends]] ship|the [[canon]] [[Trustworthy|vessel by that name]]}}
The '''''Trustworthy''''' was a [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]] [[Etti Lighter|''Etti''-class light transport]] that was owned and piloted by [[Drolen Antig]].
